scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.dev:full: concurrently -n db,setup,server,client -c yellow,magenta,blue,green "npm run db:up --prefix server" "npm run dev:setup --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix server && npm run build --prefix client
scripts.check: npm run typecheck --prefix server && npm run typecheck --prefix client
